name: Banana Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk.
2. Mix the sugar, cornstarch, and salt, then add to hot milk, stirring rapidly and cooking until thickened.
3. Beat the eggs. Add a little of the hot liquid to the eggs, then add them to the thickened mixture. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Stir in butter and vanilla.
5. Cool, stirring once only after 5 minutes.
6. Slice bananas on bottom of baked, cooked pie crust.
7. Place half of pie filling on top of bananas.
8. Add another layer of sliced bananas and place remaining pie filling on top of bananas.
9. Garnish with bananas and whipped cream.
